items.headline: How Investors May Respond To Caterpillar (CAT) Dividend Hike And Lynn Good’s Board Appointment
items.summary: At its 2026 annual meeting held on June 10, Caterpillar Inc. elected former Duke Energy CEO Lynn J. Good to its board and approved an increase in the quarterly dividend to US$1.63 per share, payable on August 19 to shareholders of record on July 20. The dividend hike, extending Caterpillar’s multi‑decade pattern of raising payouts, underscores how management is pairing record backlog and strong cash generation with an ongoing commitment to shareholder returns. We’ll now examine how this...

items.headline: Move Over, New York! Why Texas Is Becoming ‘America’s New Center of Gravity’
items.summary: On a recent Diet TBPN segment, co-host John Coogan read at length from an Economist piece making a striking claim about where corporate America now lives. The thesis, quoted directly: “Texas is steadily establishing itself as America Inc.’s new center of gravity. No state receives more business investment or is adding more people to its ... items.headline: Does Caterpillar's 8% Dividend Hike Signal More Growth Ahead?
items.summary: CAT boosts its quarterly dividend 8% to $1.63, notching 32 straight years of hikes as Q1 revenues jumped 22% and backlog hit $62.7B.
